main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'incomplete ripening greensand → Fe/Mn breakthrough + colloidal Fe(OH)3 + Mn oxide' — captura una de 3 hipótesis aceptadas (Fe/Mn).

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (sílice, biofouling, MECH defect, KMnO4 dosing).

recommended_action.justification: Shut down + full backwash greensand + ripening cycle 8-12h — operacional para greensand; sin CIP para membrana ya ensuciada.

requested_data.justification: Pide microscopic/SEM brown deposit cartridges + stage 2 membrane — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: si sílice scale en lugar de Fe oxide → switch.
